query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multi-turn reflective masking elicits reasoning in mask diffusion mode" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the core mechanism of "mask diffusion" for language modeling, which is the specific technical domain of the user's question, even though it focuses on general generation quality rather than the specific "reflective masking" for reasoning mentioned in the user's title. It provides the foundational context for the "diffusion language model" and "masking" variables central to the user's research topic.
